headline: 2 Growth Stocks with All-Star Potential and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Growth is oxygen. But when it evaporates, the consequences can be severe - ask anyone who bought Cisco in the Dot-Com Bubble or newer investors who lived through the 2020 to 2022 COVID cycle.

headline: Cybersecurity Spending Just Crossed $300 Billion and These 3 ETFs Are the Cleanest Plays on the AI Era Attack Surface
summary: Global cybersecurity spending is forecast to exceed $300 billion in 2026, and the catalyst is no longer abstract. AI agents now outnumber human identities within enterprises by roughly 109 to 1; Fortinet’s threat report logged a 389% year-over-year jump in ransomware victims; and Check Point measured a 51-point gap between corporate AI adoption and security ... Cybersecurity Spending Just Crossed $300 Billion and These 3 ETFs Are the Cleanest Plays on the AI Era Attack Surface

headline: Cisco (CSCO) Stock Looks Stretched On Cash Flow Yet Reasonable On Earnings
summary: Cisco Systems stock has delivered a strong 142.4% return over the past 5 years, yet the latest valuation work suggests the price now sits at a premium to its intrinsic value estimate, while market multiples look roughly in line with peers. A 142.4% gain over 5 years signals that long term holders have already enjoyed substantial returns, so fresh buyers are stepping in at a very different entry point. Growing expectations around Cisco’s role in AI driven networking and cloud managed...
